title: lithocarpus concentricus
intro: Lithocarpus concentricus, also known as the Coastal Live Oak, is a type of evergreen tree native to the Pacific coast of North America, characterized by its twisted branches and broad, rounded leaves. The medicinal properties of Lithocarpus concentricus have been utilized for centuries, with its bark and leaves said to possess anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits associated with this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and even exhibit antiviral activity. Lithocarpus concentricus can be prepared as a decoction or infusion, allowing for the extraction of its medicinal compounds and utilization in traditional herbal remedies.
